notes: French object database company founded as O2 Research project. Produced O2 ODMG Database System. Acquired by Informix in 1998; technology absorbed into IBM portfolio after IBM acquired Informix database division in 2001.
Acquired O2 Technology in 1998. Informix itself acquired Illustra (object-relational) in 1996. IBM acquired Informix Software for $1 billion in 2001.
Acquired Informix Software (including O2 lineage) for $1B in 2001. DB2 became the consolidated IBM database platform.
Consortium to standardize OODBMS. O2 Technology was a voting member. ODMG disbanded 2001 after transitioning efforts to Java Data Objects (JDO) spec.
